title: Mizuho shares slide 7% after denying decision on reported Rakuten Bank investment shift
summary_full: Shares of Mizuho Financial Group fell over 7% Monday, after the company said it has not made decision yet on investment in Rakuten Bank.
summary_public: Shares of Mizuho Financial Group fell over 7% Monday, after the company said it has not made decision yet on investment in Rakuten Bank.
